languages.text: "Пожалуйста. Не хочу... мучиться. Время искупления... для одного".
"Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."
languages.original_text: "Пожалуйста. Не хочу... мучиться. Время искупления... для одного".

traits.locale_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."
"Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."
"Please. I don't want to... suffer. I've served well. And taught more than one Call-Up to fight. It's time for freedom... for the one."
"Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."
"Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."

languages.text: 「お願いだ。苦しみたくない。私は務めは果たしたし、召集兵にも何人も戦い方を教えてきた。『一人に自由を』の時だ。」
languages.original_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. I've served well. And taught more than one Call-Up to fight. It's time for freedom... for the one."

traits.locale_text: お願いだ。……苦しみたくない。私は務めは果たしたし、召集兵にも何人も戦い方を教えてきた。『一人に自由を』の時だ……。

languages.text: « Je vous en prie, je ne veux pas... souffrir. L'heure de l'expiation... est venue pour moi. »
languages.original_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous en prie, je ne veux pas... souffrir. L'heure de l'expiation... est venue pour moi. »

languages.text: Lütfen. Acı çekmek... İstemiyorum. Vakit geldi... Sona kalana kefaret."
languages.original_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."

traits.locale_text: Lütfen. Acı çekmek... İstemiyorum. Vakit geldi... Sona kalana kefaret."

languages.text: "Bitte. Ich will nicht ... leiden. Es wird Zeit für die Sühne ... für den Einzelnen."
languages.original_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte. Ich will nicht ... leiden. Es wird Zeit für die Sühne ... für den Einzelnen."

languages.text: «Por favor. No quiero... sufrir. Es hora de la expiación... para el último».
languages.original_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."

traits.locale_text: «Por favor. No quiero... sufrir. Es hora de la expiación... para el último».

languages.text: “求您了。我不想……再受折磨了。是时候迎接……一人之赎了。”
languages.original_text: "Please. I don't want to... suffer. It's time for atonement... for the one."

traits.locale_text: “求您了。我不想……再受折磨了。是时候迎接……一人之赎了。
